original_hypothesis.title: Historical Reward Corruption via Unsynchronized Block Time Updates
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: Governance can update block time parameters via setBlockTimeParameters. If update_market is not explicitly called for all markets beforehand, the new parameters retroactively alter epochTime for past un-updated blocks, corrupting historical reward distribution.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: Requires governance to make an operational mistake, but the impact is systemic and allows retroactive theft of yield.
deployment_assumptions: Governance updates block time parameters without syncing all markets first
original_hypothesis.config_evidence: LendingLedger.sol setBlockTimeParameters() lacks an internal loop to sync markets.

proof_of_signal.pattern: State update of time parameters without enforcing market synchronization

preconditions: At least one market has un-updated historical epochs

initial_economic_evidence.suspicious_calculation: epochTime calculation instantly changes for all past blocks in the update_market loop
initial_economic_evidence.manipulation_vector: Attacker anticipates governance action, manipulates current gauge weights, and waits for the parameter update
initial_economic_evidence.profit_hypothesis: Attacker claims rewards based on the newly shifted epochTime mapping to highly favorable historical weights

economic_questions: How drastically can epochTime shift during a realistic parameter update?
Can this shift align un-updated blocks with periods of 100% gauge weight for the attacker?
validation_requirements: Simulate parameter update with un-updated markets and measure reward delta

preliminary_attack_economics.potential_profit_range: Variable based on the time shift magnitude

potential_victim_impact.estimated_impact_per_user: Loss of earned rewards due to time-shift dilution
potential_victim_impact.total_value_at_risk: Pending rewards across all unsynced markets

investigation_priorities.calculation_validation: epochTime delta before and after update

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
